business.headline: Gratuity rises under new labour rules, but what if you quit before 5 years?New labour laws may boost your gratuity, but does quitting before five years mean missing out completely? Let's have a look.

OnEMI Tech IPO far from fully booked; brokerage flags key risksOnEMI Technology Solutions' IPO remained underbooked on the second day, with weak retail and NII demand. The muted grey market premium and brokerage warnings have kept the issue in a cautious zone.

Your mobile number is key to your finances. Here's the upside and riskIn India, the mobile number is becoming the key identifier across banking, payments, loans and insurance. That convenience is widening access, but it is also sharpening concerns around fraud, privacy and control.

Explained: Why BHEL share price jumped 10% to hit upper circuit todayBHEL stock: BHEL shares hit the 10% upper circuit after the company reported a sharp March quarter earnings beat. The rally was driven by stronger profit, better margins, solid revenue growth and a dividend recommendation.

8th Pay Commission update: Where things stand after 6 monthsSix months since its formation, the 8th Pay Commission is showing signs of progress, but key recommendations, timelines and clarity on pay revisions for central government employees are still awaited.

Are election results behind today's fall in gold prices?Gold prices slipped on Monday, and one big question is on everyone's mind, i.e., are election results the reason behind the dip, or is there more at play in the market?

Why India's smaller cities are the next premium real estate goldmineTier II and III cities are emerging as the next hub for premium real estate growth, driven by infrastructure spending and stronger connectivity. The shift points to a long-term move towards high-value housing beyond metros as incomes and aspirations rise.

Watch: Gaurav Khanna visits Siddhivinayak temple ahead of Khatron Ke Khiladi 15 Gaurav Khanna visited Mumbai's Siddhivinayak Temple with his parents before starting Khatron Ke Khiladi 15. His remarks to the media and the confirmed contestant list have added to the buzz around the new season.

Vijay's TVK defeated Tamil Nadu giant DMK, headed by Kalaignar M Karunanidhi for 50 years.

Ssunita Ahuja on reuniting with Krushna, Kashmera, grandchildren: My heart's happy Sunita Ahuja reflected on her emotional reunion with her nephew Krushna Abhishek and his wife Kashmera Shah after 14 years. She shared that the moment was especially special as she met their children - Rayaan and Krishaang - for the first time.

When will this war end? Ameesha Patel's flight diverted as Dubai shuts airspace Actor Ameesha Patel said her flight from New York to Mumbai was diverted to Muscat, as Dubai closed its airspace due to fresh missile attacks.

Viral: Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone film romantic beach scene for King New visuals from King show actors Shah Rukh Khan and Deepika Padukone filming a romantic beach sequence in South Africa. The leak has kept attention on the film, which is slated to release on December 24.

The Odyssey new trailer: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Robert Pattinson set up epic vibes Universal Pictures has unveiled a new trailer for Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey, showing Odysseus facing the Cyclops and Antinous eyeing Ithaca's throne. The footage sets up Nolan's next big-screen spectacle as the film heads towards a July 17 release and an IMAX first.

The posts drew attention as TVK secured 108 seats and online speculation around Vijay and Trisha continued.

Eilish called the offer pretty magical as the project brings her live world into cinemas with new visual technology.

Malayalam actor Santhosh Nair dies in road accident, wife injured Malayalam actor Santhosh Nair died after a road accident at Enathu in Kerala's Pathanamthitta and a heart attack during treatment. He was last in Mohiniyattam, which received rave reviews.

After a decade, Beyonce makes a stunning Met Gala return in diamond skeleton look Beyonce returned to the Met Gala after 10 years, attending with Jay-Z and Blue Ivy. Her comeback as co-chair turned the family appearance into one of the night's biggest moments.

general news.headline: TVK plans talks with Congress, Left parties to form coalition govt: SourcesVijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), which won 108 seats in a strong debut in Tamil Nadu, but fell short of a majority, is eyeing talks with the Congress, Left and smaller parties to form a coalition government, sources told India Today TV.

If Bengal wanted BJP, then Bengal has got BJP: Mahua MoitraMahua Moitra responded to the BJP's sweep in Bengal, saying her party fought against unimaginable odds on an uneven pitch. She also acknowledged the will of the people, framing her reaction around both the contest and the verdict.

Annamalai: The missing star of Tamil Nadu electionOnce projected as the BJP's face of expansion in Tamil Nadu, IPS officer-turned-politician K Annamalai found himself off the ballot as the party pivoted back to alliance with the AIADMK. What does his absence from the centre stage highlight? How does his absence reflect the BJP's own dilemma in Tamil Nadu?

Live: BJP appoints Amit Shah as Bengal observer as party brainstorms CM choiceAssembly Election Result Live Updates: The 2026 Assembly results are redrawing India's political map, with the BJP poised to form its first government in West Bengal after crossing the 200-mark in a 294-seat House, while retaining Assam for a third straight term. In Bengal, counting is in its final leg, with the Trinamool Congress leading in the lone remaining seat — Rajarhat New Town — where one more round is pending. The state voted in two phases on April 23 and 29, recording a turnout of over 92 per cent. The Election Commission has also ordered a repoll in Falta on May 21, citing "severe electoral offences," with results to follow separately. Beyond Bengal, the national picture is crystallising — most notably in Tamil Nadu, where actor-politician Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) is set to form the government in its debut outing, signalling a major political shift. Stay tuned to indiatoday.in for all the latest updates.

Return as 'street fighter' or Delhi chalo: What Mamata may plan nextMamata Banerjee faces a defining moment after the BJP swept both her Bengal bastion and Bhabanipur home turf. It has raised speculation on what might be Mamata's next political move.

From house help to MLA: BJP's Kalita Majhi wins seat as saffron wave sweeps BengalKalita Majhi, a domestic worker from Guskara, won the Ausgram seat as the BJP swept West Bengal. Her victory underscored the party's push for grassroots candidates amid a wider political shift in the state.

Did fear and force projection influence Bengal election results?Bengal's 2026 election unfolded under an unprecedented central security deployment after years of poll violence. The heavy presence of forces reshaped voter confidence and became a key factor in the BJP's historic victory.

Vijay landslide: TN hasn't abandoned its grammar. It has changed the lead characterThere is admiration in the verdict, but there is also a warning embedded in it. A democracy that seeks a messiah might find the energy, but it must still demand method. A face can win a mandate; only institutions can sustain it. Therein lies Vijay's next big challenge.

Hit by SIR, now a winner in Bengal - Motab Shaikh's unlikely storyWith nominations imminent, Motab Shaikh approached the Supreme Court in a last-ditch effort, securing the first hearing before Bengal's new Appellate Tribunal. The tribunal found no discrepancies in his documents, including his passport, and directed his inclusion as a valid voter, allowing him to file his nomination.

FIFA has not finalised a broadcaster for the 2026 World Cup in India after rejecting the Reliance-Disney joint venture's bid. Kal Somani-led group say they were pushed out of deal The Kal Somani-led consortium has claimed it was pushed out of the Rajasthan Royals ownership deal despite leading the bid for six months. Langer defends LSG captain IPL 2026: Justin Langer defended Rishabh Pant's form and tactical calls after Lucknow Super Giants lost to Mumbai Indians. Premier League title race out of City's hands after Everton draw: GuardiolaPep Guardiola said Manchester City's 3-3 draw with Everton left the title race out of their hands as he conceded that the advantage is now with Arsenal.

The win lifted MI to six points and kept their slim playoff chances alive.

FIFA rejects Reliance-Disney $20M bid for 2026 World Cup India rightsFIFA has rejected Reliance-Disney's $20 million bid for India's 2026 World Cup broadcast rights package. With time shrinking, millions of fans could miss the tournament unless broadcasters strike terms quickly.

The leg-spinner also impressed with figures of 4-0-36-1, underlining his steady rise from domestic grind to the Mumbai Indians setup.

IPL: Delhi prepare to unleash hell on CSK as Lungi Ngidi returnsLungi Ngidi is available for Delhi Capitals' home match against Chennai Super Kings after completing the mandatory break. 'BJP agent Messi': Fans have field-day after party sweeps Bengal electionsThe BJP swept the Bengal elections marking the end of the 15-year-rule of the TMC. Amidst the frenzy, the sports fans wondered, was this loss triggered by Lionel Messi's visit to Kolkata?

Will Rohit Sharma play MI vs LSG? Hitman's intense training session lifts hopesIPL 2026: Mumbai Indians are waiting on Rohit Sharma's fitness before facing Lucknow Super Giants at the Wankhede. His possible return comes as both sides fight to stay alive in the points table.

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna.
